label: Day 5 — Morning: Institutional Visit
description: A morning outside the venue for a guided institutional visit to a sustainability-focused organisation in Istanbul. This gives participants a real-world, local perspective on environmental action — connecting the exchange's themes to concrete, ongoing work in the host city.
objectives: Discover how sustainability is being addressed institutionally in Istanbul
Connect global environmental themes to local Turkish realities
Practice structured observation and critical questioning
Gather inspiration and material for the Green Map output

steps.title: Pre-visit briefing
steps.body: Facilitator introduces the hosting organisation. Each team receives a specific observation focus: Team 1 — community engagement; Team 2 — practical green initiatives; Team 3 — challenges and barriers; Team 4 — what could be replicated in other countries.

steps.title: Guided visit
steps.body: Tour of the facility with a local representative. Participants use the observation sheet below to take structured notes. Each team prepares 2 questions based on their focus area.

steps.title: Q&A with the host
steps.body: Structured Q&A — each team asks their prepared questions. Facilitator ensures all voices are heard, not just the confident speakers.

steps.title: Debrief walk back
steps.body: Walking back to the venue, teams discuss: What surprised you? What would work in your country? What wouldn't? What will you add to the Green Map from today?

facilitatorNote: Coordinate the visit logistics at least 2 weeks in advance. Confirm the host has experience with international youth groups. Brief them to avoid overly formal presentations — the most valuable moments are always the informal exchanges and the questions participants ask spontaneously.
